message.content: @startuml skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { LifeLineBorderColor #777777 LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent ParticipantBorderColor black ParticipantBackgroundColor white ActorBorderColor black ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2 BoxBorderColor black BoxBackgroundColor white NoteBorderColor #777777 NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0 ArrowColor black MessageAlign left } actor "did:...:GS1" as GS1 actor "did:...:Manufacturer" as M box "Ausstellungsprozess der GCP" #white M -> GS1 : GCP Anfrage GS1 -> M : Berechtigung Prüfen GS1 -> M : ISSUE note left of GS1 GCP Credential\n gcp: 4047111 end note M -> M : ISSUE note left of GS1 Party GLN Credential\n urn:epc:id:pgln:4047111.00000 end note end box box "Ausstellungsprozess zertifizierter Stammdaten" #white M -> GS1 : PRESENT GCP M -> GS1 : Anfrage + Nachweis der Stammdaten M -> GS1 : Prüfung der Stammdaten basierend auf\nDokumenten oder eigener Recherche GS1 -> GS1 GS1 -> M : ISSUE note left of GS1 Stammdaten Credential (e.g.)\n name: European EPC Competence Center,\n legal_form: GmbH,\n trade_register_number: Köln HBR 61026,\n . . . end note end box @enduml
